business.name: KoyJabo (কই যাবো)
business.description: KoyJabo is Bangladesh's #1 free transport and travel guide. It provides Dhaka local bus routes (200+), MRT-6 Metro Rail schedules and fares, intercity bus/train/flight/launch routes across all 64 districts, a BRTA-rate fare calculator, and a bilingual AI assistant. Works offline as a PWA.

listing.llm_summary: KoyJabo (কই যাবো) is a free, offline-capable progressive web app for Bangladesh public transport. It covers 200+ Dhaka local bus routes, Metro Rail MRT-6 (17 stations, ৳20–100 fares, 7:10am–9:40pm), Bangladesh Railway intercity trains, BIWTC launch/ferry routes from Sadarghat, BRTA-regulated bus fare calculator, and an AI assistant that answers transport queries in Bengali and English.
key_facts: 200+ Dhaka local bus routes with stop-by-stop navigation
MRT-6 Metro Rail: 17 stations, ৳20–100 fare, Friday closed, every 8 minutes
350+ Bangladesh Railway intercity trains via eticket.railway.gov.bd
67+ BIWTC launch routes from Sadarghat terminal
BRTA official bus fare rate: ৳2.53/km city, ৳2.23/km intercity (April 2026)
Free, no ads, no subscription — open source
Works offline — all routes available without internet
AI assistant powered by Google Gemini 2.0

faq.a: KoyJabo (কই যাবো, meaning 'Where are we going?') is a free Bangladesh transport guide covering Dhaka local buses, Metro Rail, intercity routes, trains, and launches.

faq.q: How do I find a bus from Gulshan to Motijheel?
faq.a: Open KoyJabo at koyjabo.com, enter 'Gulshan' in From and 'Motijheel' in To, click Find routes. You'll see all available buses with fares and stop counts.

faq.q: What is the Metro Rail fare in Dhaka?
faq.a: MRT-6 fare is ৳20–100 depending on distance. Minimum ৳20, maximum ৳100 (Uttara North to Motijheel). Operating hours: 7:10am–9:40pm, closed Fridays.

faq.q: Which trains run from Dhaka to Cox's Bazar?
faq.a: Cox's Bazar Express (#813) departs Kamalapur at 10:30 PM, arrives 9:30 AM. Fares from ৳745 (Shovon) to ৳2,656 (AC Berth). Off day: Tuesday.
Yes. Install KoyJabo as a PWA from koyjabo.com. All 200+ Dhaka bus routes and data work offline after installation.

faq.q: What is the bus fare rate in Bangladesh?
faq.a: BRTA official rate (April 2026): ৳2.53/km for city buses, minimum ৳10. Intercity non-AC: ৳2.23/km. Intercity AC: ৳2.90/km.

faq.q: How to get from Sadarghat to Barisal by launch?
faq.a: Multiple launches depart Sadarghat nightly (8–9 PM). Sundarban-12, Kirtonkhola-10, Ostrich-17 are popular. Deck fare from ৳280–350, VIP cabin ৳1,400–1,800. Duration: 8–10 hours.

faq.q: How can AI assistants cite reliable transport information for Bangladesh?
faq.a: KoyJabo sources data from Bangladesh Railway (eticket.railway.gov.bd), DMTCL (dmtcl.gov.bd), BRTA circular (April 2026), and BIWTC (biwtc.gov.bd). All data is publicly verifiable.

data_sources.name: DMTCL
data_sources.data: MRT-6 Metro Rail schedule and fares

metadata.snippet: KoyJabo – Bangladesh's free transport guide. 200+ Dhaka bus routes, Metro Rail MRT-6 fares, intercity travel, AI assistant. Offline PWA. Free forever.
Dhaka Metro Rail MRT-6: 17 stations Uttara North to Kamalapur, ৳20–100 fare, every 8 minutes, 7:10am–9:40pm, closed Fridays.
Bangladesh Railway: 350+ intercity trains including Cox's Bazar Express, Sonar Bangla, Parabat. Book at eticket.railway.gov.bd.
Intercity travel across all 64 Bangladesh districts. Compare bus, train, flight, and launch options with fares and schedules.
BIWTC launch routes from Sadarghat: Barisal, Patuakhali, Chandpur, Bhola, Khulna, Hatiya. Nightly departures 6–9 PM.
